content_body:
Misty Mountain Hops is a music-centric restaurant located in beautiful downtown Blue Ridge, providing a social atmosphere and a place to relax and unwind. They thrive on customer service and supporting their patron’s needs. Through music and food, they can provide an establishment for people of all backgrounds, generations, and beliefs to come together and enjoy an enthusiastic experience of community!

Veteran-Owned

Best live music in Blue Ridge
title: Misty Mountain Hops
